response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development and leadership roles, but their expertise is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and scripting languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React, Python) rather than C++ and industrial automation. There is no clear evidence of C++ system design, STL, multi-threading, secure development practices, or industrial cybersecurity standards (e.g., IEC 62443) in their work history. Their recent roles at Google and Meta further emphasize modern web stacks and AI infrastructure, which are not aligned with the core requirements of this role.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in large-scale systems and scalable architectures
Proven leadership and mentorship in development teams and workshops
Demonstrated ability to deliver high-performance solutions in diverse domains (embedded, IoT, GIS)
concerns: Lacks direct C++ and STL experience in mid-to-senior roles; recent work focuses on JavaScript/TypeScript and cloud services
No documented experience with secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 standards
Limited exposure to industrial automation, message brokers, or protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, etc.)
